\tzpentry{ID4382}{Free Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4382 introduces Free Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Hhat_{p,\sigma}^{\mathrm{free}} = \int_0^L \mathrm{d}s\; \hat{\psi}_{p,\sigma}^\dagger(s) \left[ -\frac{\hbar^2}{2 m_p}\frac{\partial^2}{\partial s^2} + V_{p,\sigma}(s) \right] \hat{\psi}_{p,\sigma}(s), \end{equation}
